name: Speciality Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Cream of mushroom soup, condensed can
12 oz Whole kernel corn, drained can
2 oz Jar pimiento, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, brown the meat uncovered in the Microwave Oven for 4 minutes. Stir occasionally to break up meat chunks.
2. Drain any excess fat.
3. Add onions and heat uncovered in the Microwave Oven for 3 minutes or until the onion is tender.
4. Add the remaining ingredients to the meat mixture. Pour into a shallow, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.
5. Heat uncovered in the Microwave Oven for 9 minutes or until the sauce is bubbly.
